description_long: This kiosk is a promotional display for Lux Botanicals, featuring a multi-tiered shelving structure adorned with artificial cherry blossom flowers. The main body is predominantly white with black accents and is decorated with printed branding and product images. The upper section includes a decorative canopy with lattice panels and floral arrangements, while the lower shelves are stocked with various bottles of Lux Botanicals products in organized rows. A freestanding signboard with pink floral motifs stands adjacent to the kiosk, providing additional promotional information. The overall design is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with a strong emphasis on floral and botanical themes.
description: A white, multi-tiered Lux Botanicals promotional kiosk with cherry blossom decorations, product shelves, and a floral-themed signboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Lux Botanicals branding, product shelves filled with bottles, decorative canopy, and floral arrangements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving, the lattice canopy structure, and the adjacent floral signboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional product shelves, floral decorations, and the back of the canopy with Lux branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement of products, the lattice panels, and the side of the signboard.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs and logos on the front, sides, and canopy; freestanding printed signboard with floral graphics and Japanese text.
attribute_roof_design: Flat canopy with decorative lattice panels and artificial cherry blossom flowers; white finish with black trim.
